mnemonics: C.I.E. stands for Continuous Internal Evaluation, like a computer's vision system that continuously evaluates its internal state (e.g., camera calibration) to maintain performance.
keyPoints: CIE is an ongoing assessment method used throughout a module.
It evaluates a student's understanding and progress before the final exam.
It often includes quizzes, assignments, projects, and class participation.
commonMistakes: Confusing CIE (Continuous Internal Evaluation) with a final exam or one-time test.
Assuming CIE marks are insignificant and not preparing for them seriously.
Procrastinating on CIE assignments, causing last-minute stress and lower grades.
